subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! The tongue of mine outer and inner being doth bear witness to that which Thou didst testify of Thine own Self
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی یشهد لسان ظاهری و باطنی بما شهدت لنفسک قبل خلق السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @Mosaic imagery, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
